problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: The key to What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? is Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor — specifically Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via — which would help 200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
